query: Find 10 buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: Get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: Get 200-year flood zones in Drammen municipality

4.description: Get quick-clay hazard zones in Drammen municipality

6.description: Calculate distance from each building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone (ascending)

executions.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn = 'Drammen';

SELECT
    bygningsid,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geometri, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkelenbygning.building
WHERE
    kommunenummer = '3301';
